extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz attacked inside 2km on Col de la Porte after Jumbo-Visma pacing shredded field, held off PINOT for 8-second gap
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma's sustained pacing via Castroviejo/Kuss/Sepp dropped favorites before Roglic attacked, validating domestique-driven mountain strategy
Roglic waited for all rivals to attack first before countering inside 2km, exploiting tired legs from INEOS tempo
INEOS pace via Sivakov/Bernal too hard to allow teammates like Thomas to contribute, wasteful distribution
Egan BERNAL attempted accelerations but couldn't follow when Roglic countered, signaling form deficit vs Slovenia

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Answered Tour favoritism questions by sitting wheels all climb then soloing to 8-second gap inside 2km
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: Initiated attacks but unable to respond when Roglic countered, concerning form deficit
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: Couldn't take turns for INEOS train, commentary explicitly questioned Tour selection
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: Only rider to limit gap to Roglic to 8 seconds after sitting on INEOS pace
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: negative: Dropped before final 2km on HC climb, unexpected weakness on sustained gradient
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: Dropped on lower slopes of first HC climb, couldn't handle initial 11% gradient kilometer
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: Crashed early, completed domestique work pulling then abandoned, tactical withdrawal
rider_signals.PORT Richie: positive: Still present in final group and attempted late attack, unexpected GC form signal
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: Attacked multiple times in final 2km and looked strong, better form than pre-race expectations
